name: mindline
description: A secure P2P chat application with real-time typing indicators

scripts.test:e2e:required: E2E_STRICT_P2P=1 playwright test tests/e2e/connection-status.spec.ts tests/e2e/landing-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/messaging.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-persistence.spec.ts tests/e2e/room-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-network.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:best-effort: playwright test tests/e2e/edit-delete.spec.ts tests/e2e/mobile-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e/p2p-multiuser.spec.ts tests/e2e/peer-list.spec.ts tests/e2e/reactions.spec.ts tests/e2e/typing-indicators.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:remote:required: E2E_STRICT_P2P=1 SKIP_SIGNALING_START=1 bash scripts/test-e2e-with-signaling.sh -- tests/e2e/connection-status.spec.ts tests/e2e/landing-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/messaging.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-persistence.spec.ts tests/e2e/room-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-network.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:with-signaling:required: E2E_STRICT_P2P=1 bash scripts/test-e2e-with-signaling.sh tests/e2e/connection-status.spec.ts tests/e2e/landing-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/messaging.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-persistence.spec.ts tests/e2e/room-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-network.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:with-signaling:best-effort: bash scripts/test-e2e-with-signaling.sh tests/e2e/edit-delete.spec.ts tests/e2e/mobile-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e/p2p-multiuser.spec.ts tests/e2e/peer-list.spec.ts tests/e2e/reactions.spec.ts tests/e2e/typing-indicators.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ci: E2E_STRICT_P2P=1 bash scripts/test-e2e-with-signaling.sh --project='Desktop Chrome' tests/e2e/connection-status.spec.ts tests/e2e/landing-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/messaging.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-persistence.spec.ts tests/e2e/room-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e/required-network.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ci:full: pnpm run test:e2e:ci && bash scripts/test-e2e-with-signaling.sh --project='Desktop Chrome' tests/e2e/edit-delete.spec.ts tests/e2e/mobile-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e/p2p-multiuser.spec.ts tests/e2e/peer-list.spec.ts tests/e2e/reactions.spec.ts tests/e2e/typing-indicators.spec.ts
scripts.verify:rust: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test
scripts.verify:web: pnpm run build-wasm && pnpm run check && pnpm run build:production
scripts.verify:ai: pnpm run verify:rust && pnpm run verify:web && pnpm run test:e2e:ci
